parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT json_object_agg(key, value) FROM settings WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) AS config,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
    'id', p.id, 'name', p.name, 'price', p.price,
    'category', c.name, 'emoji', c.emoji
  ) ORDER BY c.sort_order, p.id)
  FROM products p
  JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id
  WHERE p.available = true AND c.active = true AND p.deleted_at IS NULL) AS products,
  (SELECT row_to_json(s)::jsonb FROM sessions s WHERE s.phone = '{{ $('Calcular Hora').first().json.tel }}') AS session,
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'code', o.code, 'items', o.items, 'total', o.total,
    'status', o.status, 'order_type', o.order_type,
    'payment_method', o.payment_method, 'created_at', o.created_at
  ) FROM orders o
  WHERE o.customer_phone = '{{ $('Calcular Hora').first().json.tel }}'
    AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_order,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
    'id', pt.id, 'name', pt.name, 'type', pt.type, 'label', pt.label, 'config', pt.config
  ) ORDER BY pt.id)
  FROM payment_types pt WHERE pt.active = true AND pt.deleted_at IS NULL) AS payment_types,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
    'id', ot.id, 'name', ot.name, 'type', ot.type, 'label', ot.label, 'config', ot.config
  ) ORDER BY ot.id)
  FROM order_types ot WHERE ot.active = true AND ot.deleted_at IS NULL) AS order_types  ,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', tb.id, 'number', tb.number, 'capacity', tb.capacity) ORDER BY tb.number)
  FROM tables tb WHERE tb.active = true AND tb.deleted_at IS NULL) AS restaurant_tables,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('date', r.date::text, 'time', r.time::text, 'table_id', r.table_id))
  FROM reservations r
  WHERE r.date >= CURRENT_DATE AND r.status IN ('pending','confirmed') AND r.deleted_at IS NULL) AS upcoming_reservations,
  (SELECT json_build_object(
    'id', dfr.id, 'mode', dfr.mode, 'base_fee', dfr.base_fee,
    'per_km_rate', dfr.per_km_rate, 'per_min_rate', dfr.per_min_rate,
    'free_above', dfr.free_above, 'max_radius_km', dfr.max_radius_km,
    'zones', COALESCE((
      SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
        'type', z.zone_type, 'min', z.min_value, 'max', z.max_value,
        'fee', z.fee, 'label', z.label
      ) ORDER BY z.zone_type, z.min_value)
      FROM delivery_fee_zones z
      WHERE z.delivery_fee_rule_id = dfr.id AND z.active = true AND z.deleted_at IS NULL
    ), '[]'::json)
  )
  FROM delivery_fee_rules dfr
  JOIN order_types ot ON ot.id = dfr.order_type_id
  WHERE ot.name = 'delivery' AND dfr.active = true AND dfr.deleted_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY dfr.id LIMIT 1) AS delivery_fee_rule
,
  (SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.phone = '{{ $('Calcular Hora').first().json.tel }}' AND c.deleted_at IS NULL) AS customer_name,
  (SELECT c.marketing_opt_in FROM customers c WHERE c.phone = '{{ $('Calcular Hora').first().json.tel }}' AND c.deleted_at IS NULL) AS marketing_opt_in,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
    'code', o.code, 'total', o.total, 'status', o.status,
    'order_type', o.order_type, 'payment_method', o.payment_method,
    'items_count', jsonb_array_length(o.items),
    'created_at', to_char(o.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI')
  ) ORDER BY o.created_at DESC)
  FROM (SELECT * FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.customer_phone = '{{ $('Calcular Hora').first().json.tel }}' AND o2.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY o2.created_at DESC LIMIT 5) o) AS recent_orders

INSERT INTO sessions (phone, state, cart, reservation_temp, last_activity_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.tel }}',
  '{{ $json.state }}',
  $cart${{ JSON.stringify($json.cart) }}$cart$::jsonb,
  $rt${{ JSON.stringify($json.reservation_temp || {}) }}$rt$::jsonb,
  now()
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  state = EXCLUDED.state,
  cart = EXCLUDED.cart,
  reservation_temp = EXCLUDED.reservation_temp,
  last_activity_at = EXCLUDED.last_activity_at,
  updated_at = now()

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $json;
if (!data.save_order) return [];
return [{ json: {
  code: data.order.code,
  tel: data.tel,
  items: data.order.items,
  subtotal: data.order.subtotal,
  delivery_fee: data.order.delivery_fee,
  total: data.order.total,
  order_type: data.order.order_type,
  address: data.order.address || '',
  maps_link: data.order.maps_link || '',
  payment_method: data.order.payment_method,
  change_for: data.order.change_for,
  split_count: data.order.split_count || 0,
  split_payments: data.order.split_payments || null
} }];

parameters.query:
WITH c AS (
  INSERT INTO customers (phone)
  VALUES ('{{ $json.tel }}')
  ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
    last_session_at = now(),
    first_session_at = COALESCE(customers.first_session_at, now()),
    total_sessions = customers.total_sessions + 1,
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING phone
)
INSERT INTO orders (code, customer_phone, items, subtotal, delivery_fee, total, order_type, address, payment_method, change_for, split_count, split_payments, status)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.code }}',
  c.phone,
  $items${{ JSON.stringify($json.items) }}$items$::jsonb,
  {{ $json.subtotal }},
  {{ $json.delivery_fee }},
  {{ $json.total }},
  '{{ $json.order_type }}',
  $addr${{ JSON.stringify({ street: $json.address || '', maps_link: $json.maps_link || '' }) }}$addr$::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.payment_method }}',
  {{ $json.change_for != null ? $json.change_for : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.split_count || 0 }},
  $sp${{ $json.split_payments ? JSON.stringify($json.split_payments) : 'null' }}$sp$::jsonb,
  'received'
FROM c
RETURNING id, code

WITH c AS (
  INSERT INTO customers (phone)
  VALUES ('{{ $json.tel }}')
  ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
    last_session_at = now(),
    first_session_at = COALESCE(customers.first_session_at, now()),
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING phone
)
INSERT INTO reservations (code, customer_phone, table_id, date, time, party_size, status)
SELECT
  'RES-' || to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') || '-' || RIGHT('{{ $json.tel }}', 4),
  c.phone,
  {{ $json.table_id }},
  '{{ $json.date }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.time }}'::time,
  {{ $json.party_size }},
  'pending'
FROM c
RETURNING id, code

INSERT INTO customers (phone, name)
VALUES ('{{ $json.tel }}', '{{ $json.customer_name }}')
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  name = EXCLUDED.name,
  updated_at = now()

INSERT INTO customers (phone, marketing_opt_in)
VALUES ('{{ $json.tel }}', {{ $json.marketing_opt_in }})
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  marketing_opt_in = EXCLUDED.marketing_opt_in,
  updated_at = now()
